channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Wisconsin's Fourqurean files injunction saying Division II years shouldn't count against eligibility
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Wisconsin cornerback Nyzier Fourqurean has filed an injunction saying the two seasons he played at Division II program Grand Valley State shouldn’t count against his college eligibility.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Maxey scores 30 points and 76ers top Kings 117-104 for their 4th straight victory
item.description: Tyrese Maxey scored 30 points to lead the Philadelphia 76ers past the Sacramento Kings 117-104 for their fourth straight victory. Maxey had his 12th consecutive game with 25 or more points and added eight assists. Kelly Oubre Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press / AP, PHL 17

item.title: Crosby's overtime goal beats Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Sidney Crosby scored with 1:06 left in overtime as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Wednesday. It was Crosby's 95th career game-winning goal, moving him past Steve Yzerman for the 13th most in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Royals agree with RHP Carlos Estévez on 2-year, $22M deal, person familiar with deal tells AP
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Royals and reliever Carlos Estévez have agreed to a two-year, $22 million contract, giving Kansas City another potential closer alongside Lucas Erceg, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pat Mahomes Sr. claims he was victimized by social media hack after perceived Bills insult
item.description: The father of Chiefs star quarterback Patrick Mahomes argued he is not responsible for the perceived diss directed at the Bills after Kansas City's AFC championship game victory.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hawks forward Jalen Johnson to have season-ending shoulder surgery on torn labrum
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Atlanta forward Jalen Johnson plans to have shoulder surgery and miss the remainder of the season, a major blow to the struggling Hawks ’ efforts to remain in the Eastern Conference playoff race.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl LIX will be 'No Drone Zone' amid incursions
item.description: Airspace over the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans will be heavily restricted from drones during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Caitlin Clark declines invite to a 3-point shootout at NBA All-Star weekend
item.description: Caitlin Clark is going to wait until Indianapolis hosts the WNBA All-Star weekend in July to enter her first 3-point contest as a pro.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The US Open tennis tournament is adding a 15th day by moving to a Sunday start in 2025
item.description: The U.S. Open is expanding to 15 days this year, shifting to a Sunday start for the first time in the Open era that began in 1968.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU outlasts Baylor in overtime, 93-89
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a perfect night for one BYU freshman, and a perfect ending for BYU Tuesday night against Baylor.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Alyssa Thomas heading to Mercury from Sun in trade, AP source says
item.description: The Phoenix Mercury were finalizing a deal to acquire Alyssa Thomas from the Connecticut Sun, a person familiar with the trade told The Associated Press on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Vanderbilt fined $500K after fans storm basketball court after victory over Kentucky
item.description: Officials said Vanderbilt will need to pay the University of Kentucky $500,000 for a third offense under the league's current policy.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Guerry, NewsNation

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden cleared in Title IX investigation regarding stalking allegations
item.description: The University of Florida has cleared men's basketball coach Todd Golden following a four-month Title IX investigation into allegations of sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and stalking.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl LIX matchup set
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The stage is set for Super Bowl 59, with two heavyweights ready to clash: the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles. The game will feature marquee stars Patrick Mahomes, Jalen Hurts, Travis Kelce, and Saquon Barkley.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Kieron van Wyk, 23, first amateur to win APGA Tour event at Farmers Invitational
item.description: Kieron van Wyk, a 23-year-old South African amateur golfer, made history as the first amateur to win an APGA Tour event at the Farmers Insurance Invitational in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — On the same evening the Chicago Bears are reportedly hiring their next defensive coordinator, the Bears have also committed to a new offensive coordinator under first-year head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford ruled out of AFC title game vs. Chiefs with a concussion
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford was ruled out of the AFC title game against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday night with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs trade for Astros former All-Star closer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a deal to acquire Houston Astros' former All-Star closer Ryan Pressly, according to reports. ESPN's Jeff Passan reports the trade is pending medical review and Pressly will waive his no-trade clause to facilitate the trade to Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Kneepkens scores 32 as Utes hold off BYU, 81-76
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The last time Gianna Kneepkens played against BYU, she suffered a season-ending knee injury in December of 2023. This time around, Kneepkens had one of the best days of her career.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Whirlwind at Farmers Insurance Open; Wind Delay at Round 2
item.description: Another day spent at Torrey Pines, but it was not a quiet day by any means.. This course is already a difficult in itself, but try adding Santa Ana winds that gust up to 35 miles per hour? The gusts dealing the day an hour and a half suspension..
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: SZA to join Kendrick Lamar for Super Bowl LIX halftime show
item.description: Apple Music released a teaser trailer on Thursday showing the Compton native on the gridiron, assessing the field before the big game while he's talking to someone on the phone.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, Fox 5

item.title: Jaguars hire Bucs OC Liam Coen as head coach after making necessary moves
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars hired Tampa Bay offensive coordinator Liam Coen as the eighth head coach in franchise history Friday, capping a covert operation that included owner Shad Khan moving on from general manager Trent Baalke and Coen reversing course with the Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: L.A.'s Genesis Invitational will be held at Torrey Pines due to fires
item.description: After several major fires erupted in Los Angeles earlier this month, the 2025 Genesis Invitational scheduled for next month has been moved to Torrey Pines Golf Course, the PGA Tour confirmed in a social media post Friday morning.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
